SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class ParameterChangeRequestDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ParameterChangeRequestDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a parameter_change_request row — the unit of the park-parameter approval workflow.

A PARK_MANAGER creates one (status ChangeStatus.PENDING); a DEPT_MANAGER approves or rejects it. parkName is not a column — ParameterChangeDAO joins it in from park purely for display, so the approval screen can show the park's name without a second lookup.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ParameterChangeRequestDTO

      public ParameterChangeRequestDTO(int id, int parkId, String parkName, int requestedBy, String requesterName, ParamField field, int oldValue, int newValue, ChangeStatus status, Integer decidedBy, String createdAt, String decidedAt)
      Creates a fully populated change request.
      Parameters:
      id - unique request identifier
      parkId - identifier of the target park
      parkName - display name of the target park (joined in for convenience)
      requestedBy - id of the park manager who requested the change
      requesterName - full name of the requesting park manager (joined in for display)
      field - which park parameter the change targets
      oldValue - the park's value for that field when the request was made
      newValue - the requested new value
      status - current lifecycle status
      decidedBy - id of the deciding department manager, or null while PENDING
      createdAt - creation timestamp (string form), or null
      decidedAt - decision timestamp (string form), or null while PENDING
